_comment: dbSNP Test Cases - Single Nucleotide Polymorphism Database
_note: dbSNP provides authoritative SNP data with genomic positions, allele frequencies, gene associations, and clinical significance

custom_tests.name: Check SNP has genomic position
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs have chromosome and position

custom_tests.name: Check SNP to gene cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs link to genes via gene_id

custom_tests.name: Check gene name text search
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs can be found by searching gene names

custom_tests.name: Check allele frequency data
custom_tests.description: Verify allele frequency is stored for population SNPs

custom_tests.name: Check clinical significance
custom_tests.description: Verify clinical significance is stored for ClinVar SNPs

custom_tests.name: Check variant type classification
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs are classified as SNV, insertion, deletion, etc.

custom_tests.name: Check functional annotations
custom_tests.description: Verify functional annotation flags (NSM, NSN, SYN, splice sites, UTRs, gene regions)

custom_tests.name: Check variant origin (SAO)
custom_tests.description: Verify SAO field distinguishes germline vs somatic variants

custom_tests.name: Check common variant flag
custom_tests.description: Verify is_common flag for common variants (MAF >= 1%)

custom_tests.name: Check publication flags
custom_tests.description: Verify publication and genotype availability flags
